name: Symptoms showed up weeks after machine accident, too late?
description: File now; med link proves it.

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after machine accident, too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: File now; med link proves it.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, if linked medically; delayed injuries common in crushes.[4][5] Report anyway.[8] Key factors: Doctor opinion connects to incident; file within deadlines. Utah allows if employer notified.
